caption: A video presentation features a digital background with a dark blue, cosmic theme. A glowing, stylized network of interconnected lines and dots floats above a curved, blue planetary horizon, suggesting a global or technological scope. Centered on the screen is the white text, "What's new in v1.6 ?". In the top right corner, a small inset video window shows a man with short hair, wearing a light-colored shirt, appearing to speak. Throughout the sequence, the main graphic and the on-screen text remain static. The man in the inset window maintains his position, with slight changes in his facial expression and posture as he speaks, while the overall composition of the presentation remains constant across the frames.
